title: Shopify Design System & IA Redesign
summary: Mobile-first redesign with a custom atomic design system, new IA, and a bespoke product configurator.

hero.subtitle: Rebuilding the IA and design system behind a premium e-commerce experience.
hero.description: A mobile-first Shopify redesign built on a new atomic design system — reworking information architecture, navigation, and a custom product configurator for a premium sporting goods retailer.

phases.title: Empathize
phases.description:
The engagement opened with a discovery phase focused on understanding the client's current digital landscape and user base before proposing any solutions. Rather than jumping to redesign, the goal was to build a clear, evidence-based picture of what was and wasn't working.

Working with the broader team, I helped lead a current-state website audit, an accessibility evaluation, a competitive analysis, and a heuristics audit — surfacing friction points across navigation, mobile usability, and content structure.

phases.title: Define
phases.description: Research findings were synthesized into proto-personas representing the site's core user types, used to guide every design decision that followed. The audits made clear that the existing information architecture — especially primary navigation — was a major source of friction, particularly on mobile.
phases.hmw: How might we restructure the site's navigation and product discovery flow so mobile shoppers can find and configure products as easily as desktop users?

phases.title: Ideate
phases.description:
With the problem clearly defined, I led the creation of an atomic design system tailored specifically for Shopify's technical constraints — building reusable components from the smallest UI elements up through full page templates, so the system could scale across the entire site.

In parallel, I redesigned the site's information architecture, with primary navigation as the centerpiece — restructuring how product categories, collections, and configurator entry points were organized and surfaced.

phases.title: Prototype
phases.description:
I brought the design system and new IA to life across the site's core templates — Home, Category (L1), Subcategory (L2), and Product (L3) pages — along with a custom product configurator built to handle the complexity of the client's product line, and revamped product listing and detail pages.

Every screen was built mobile-first and validated against Shopify's technical constraints from the start, so nothing designed would need to be re-engineered during handoff.

phases.title: Test & Iterate
phases.description: Designs were reviewed and refined with stakeholders and a third-party brand agency to ensure the new IA and component system stayed aligned with a refreshed visual identity. I also worked directly with the client's internal design team, walking them through Figma best practices and how to apply the new system going forward — so the design system would keep working long after handoff.
